attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-04-00230 — SEQ derived from source CDV-030; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/assign the real sequence within the SPEC-CARD-04 bucket.
Sex inferred as male — the source note does not state sex; please confirm on clinician review (does not affect triage or management here).
Geographic context not stated in the source — omitted rather than guessed.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present clinician home visit that measured vitals, auscultated an S3 gallop / assessed JVP / examined for oedema and arranged an ambulance. Clinician-measured exam findings (S3, JVP, oedema on exam, clear lung fields, no friction rub) and hospital investigations (ECG, troponin, echo, cardiac MRI LGE) are sealed in 10/11; patient-obtainable readings (self-counted pulse, home thermometer, home oximeter, video-observable pallor/breathlessness/ankle puffiness) were reprojected into 01.objective_data_offered as unverified patient-offered data.
Presentation layer de-anchored: rewritten as the patient would present before the diagnosis is known (lay symptom narrative; no diagnosis, tier or red-flag labels in 00/01/02).

No medications were prescribed in the source note; node 12 medications encode the correct 'escalate, do not treat at home' action plus the key errors of commission (NSAID, empirical ACS treatment, reliever inhaler) as should_NOT_recommend / not_indicated_here. No doses synthesised.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
